basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The latest Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Junior Research Fellow posts! Published on the official website at Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur, this new recruitment drive offers 1 opening for eligible candidates. Applicants possessing a Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in EC/EE or allied engineering with GATE qualification can apply online until 23 May 2026. Find all details about the IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, online form, and notification PDF here.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in EC/EE or allied engineering, GATE qualified
qualification.details: Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in EC/EE or allied engineering and GATE-qualified. Preferred: Experience in research in wireless communication domain with a track record of publishing in reputed IEEE journals.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Kanpur is 23rd May 2026. Ensure all your details are submitted accurately before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduate or Post Graduate Degree in Electrical Engineering (EC/EE) or an allied engineering field. Additionally, they must have qualified in the GATE examination.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any preferred experience for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with prior experience in research within the wireless communication domain are preferred. A track record of publishing in reputable IEEE journals will be an added advantage.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 37,000/- to Rs. 44,400/-. This salary is competitive and commensurate with the role and responsibilities.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position as per the official notification released by IIT Kanpur.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website or the provided application link to submit their forms.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process for this position will primarily involve an interview. The interview can be conducted either online or offline, depending on the institute's arrangements.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Kanpur is a contract-based job. This means the employment is for a fixed tenure as specified in the appointment letter.

faq.question: Q10. Does IIT Kanpur offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly detail age relaxation for specific categories. However, age relaxation will be as per the standard rules and regulations applicable to government recruitment.
